name: Read Cleaning
description: Screen raw or unknown FASTQ reads for host/contaminant sequences and stage cleaned reads for admin promotion

outputs.name: cleaned_read_candidates
outputs.description: Per-sample cleaned FASTQ files staged for admin review before becoming active SeqDesk reads

outputs.name: multiqc_report
outputs.description: MultiQC HTML report for classification and filtering evidence

outputs.name: summary
outputs.description: Run-level detaxizer classification and filtering summary

tax2filter.title: Taxon to Filter
tax2filter.description: Taxon name or ID passed to detaxizer. Default targets Homo sapiens.

x-seqdesk.helpText: The contaminant taxon must be represented in the configured classifier reference.

classificationKraken2.title: Kraken2 Classification
classificationKraken2.description: Use Kraken2 to identify contaminant reads.

kraken2Db.title: Kraken2 DB
kraken2Db.description: Local Kraken2 database path or an explicitly approved reference URI.

x-seqdesk.helpText: Required when Kraken2 classification is enabled. SeqDesk will not silently choose or download a database.

classificationBbduk.title: BBDuk Classification
classificationBbduk.description: Use BBDuk k-mer matching against a contaminant FASTA.

bbdukReference.title: BBDuk FASTA
bbdukReference.description: Local contaminant reference FASTA for BBDuk.

filteringTool.title: Filtering Tool
filteringTool.description: Read filtering backend used by detaxizer.

readType.title: Read Type
readType.description: Controls whether single files are written to short-read or long-read detaxizer columns.

outputRemovedReads.title: Keep Removed Reads
outputRemovedReads.description: Ask detaxizer to write removed contaminant reads to the output folder.
